name: transcript-fixer
description: Corrects speech-to-text transcription errors using dictionary rules and AI-powered analysis. Builds personalized correction databases that learn from each fix, auto-loads person-name ASR variants from your people roster, and reads per-domain context files that prime the AI pass for context-dependent homophones. Triggers when working with ASR/STT output containing recognition errors, homophones, garbled technical terms, person-name errors, or Chinese/English mixed content. Also triggers on reques
author: daymade
